name: Kurkkusalaatti (Cucumber Sour Cream Salad)
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Minced fresh dill OR 2-3 teaspoons Dried dill
Salt and black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the cucumbers but do not peel them; cut off the ends.
2. Using the tines of a fork, score the peel lengthwise on each cucumber slice.
3. Slice into rounds as thin as possible.
4. Sprinkle with 1 tablespoon of salt and toss in a colander.
5. Let the cucumbers stand and drain at room temperature for one hour.
6. Rinse well to remove the excess salt.
7. Squeeze the cucumber slices dry in a clean tea towel until they are almost transparent.
8. Combine the remaining ingredients (yogurt, vegetable oil, vinegar, dill, sugar, and seasonings) in a bowl.
9. Fold the dressing into the cucumbers until well combined.
10. Chill the salad well before serving.
11. Garnish with a sprig of fresh dill.
